title: paraderris lushaiensis
intro: Paraderris lushaiensis, a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae, is native to the northeastern region of India and Myanmar. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Paraderris lushaiensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
